migrations.description: Baseline inicial de contratos API y schemas Zod.
Alinea el contrato de actualización de usuario con avatarUrl compartido.
Align offline payload contracts with JSON-safe shared types and exported AI response schemas.
Refresh generated API contract snapshot after exposing current shared schemas.
Align generated API contract snapshot formatting with the repository Biome configuration.
Emit canonical English role values while keeping legacy role inputs normalized at boundaries.
Fix TypeScript errors in costs module - getCostDashboard method, resolveLineDeltaStatus types, hasCosts field.
Replace legacy Spanish order contract fields and selected snake_case persistence fields with canonical English camelCase names.
Rename all Spanglish enum values to canonical English across execution phases, activity types, inspection types, and kit categories.
Remove legacy execution phase and status aliases and omit absent execution phase timestamps from the public order contract.
Expand OrderStatus enum to 16 values covering the full FSM pipeline (proposal, planning, billing stages). Add FSM transitions, terminal/active/editable state sets, and kanban column mappings.

Complete implementation of the CERMONT FSM pipeline. Includes dynamic personnel assignments, kit availability checks, backend safety verification synchronization, enhanced dashboard metrics, and catalog management for checklists and report templates.
